iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(7,10): error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type 'A'.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(11,17): error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type 'A'.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(14,7): error TS1003: Identifier expected.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(14,8): error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(14,8): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'el'.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(14,10): error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(14,12): error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(15,1): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'el'.
iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua(17,13): error TS7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type '0' can't be used to index type 'B | A[]'.
  Property '0' does not exist on type 'B | A[]'.


==== iterationErrorOverNotIterableUnions1.tlua (9 errors) ====
    type A = { a: string };
    type B = { b: string };
    
    declare data: A[] | B;
    
    for _, item in ipairs(data) do
        item.b;
             ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type 'A'.
    end
    
    for _, ignoredItem in ipairs(data) do
        ignoredItem.b;
                    ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'b' does not exist on type 'A'.
    end
    
    local [el] = data;
          ~
!!! error TS1003: Identifier expected.
           ~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
           ~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'el'.
             ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    el.b;
    ~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'el'.
    
    local el2 = data[0];
                ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type '0' can't be used to index type 'B | A[]'.
!!! error TS7053:   Property '0' does not exist on type 'B | A[]'.
    el2.b;
